Actually domain: (:types ... candidate_root - ... candidate_entity - candidate_root ... driver_availability_state - candidate_entity ... origin_candidate_availability - driver_availability_state ...). So origin_candidate_availability is a candidate_entity. So actions that take candidate_entity can apply. For preparing, we need to attach a task profile?
